h1.visual_description: Large, bold, black sans-serif font, serving as the primary page headline.
h1.example_text: SS Pack allows businesses to access further data more rapidly

h2.visual_description: Medium-sized, purple sans-serif font, positioned at the top left as a section or category label.

h3.visual_description: Standard-sized, bold, black sans-serif font, used for sub-headers within columns.

visual_matchers.pattern: Purple vertical line on the far left margin
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Visual container/anchor for the page header section.

visual_matchers.pattern: Large purple text above column headers
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Key performance metrics or high-level value propositions.
Reference markers for technical footnotes or citations.

visual_matchers.pattern: Small, light-grey text at the bottom
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Footnotes, methodology descriptions, and legal disclaimers.

layout_info.primary_flow: Mixed: Single-column header and intro text, transitioning into a three-column grid for feature details.
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page number in the bottom right corner; light grey footnote block at the bottom left margin.
